---
title: "Quasi-Experimental Design Labs"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.hero-panel}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Evaluation design knowledge base</span>

# Build the design before you estimate

Quasi-Experimental Design Labs organizes working material for quasi-experimental evaluation into three practical routes. Use slides for the shortest overview, notes for the detailed method explanation, and labs for code and workflows you can run yourself.

::: {.cta-row}
[Start with Slides](slides/index.qmd){.cta-button}
[Start with Notes](notes/index.qmd){.cta-button}
[Open Labs](labs/index.qmd){.cta-button .secondary}
:::
:::
